message:
fix(session): improve crypto randomUUID handling for quote IDs

Improved crypto API usage for generating attached quote IDs:
- Use explicit typeof check for crypto.randomUUID function
- Remove redundant fallback - throw error if crypto unavailable
- Aligns with similar improvements in prediction-lock.ts
